subject: Krokorok — bipedal crocodilian Pokemon with bandage-stripe markings, wide open mouth, standing upright
description: A stocky bipedal crocodilian creature stands upright facing the viewer with its mouth wide open, showing rows of teeth. Its body is covered in alternating dark and sandy-brown banded markings that wrap around like bandages. Large round eyes sit prominently on its head. The background is a warm earthy desert tone with loose sandy or rocky ground implied beneath it. The overall posture is bold and confrontational.
foreground: Krokorok standing upright, mouth agape, banded body markings prominent
background: warm earthy desert tones, dark shadowed ground
emotion: aggressive, mouth wide open in a roar or challenge
